name: Roettger Bus Svc
registry_source: Wisconsin Department of Financial Institutions (not directly confirmed)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record for Roettger Bus Service (wildcard *ROETTGER* search returned 8 carriers, none being bus/school transit; closest Wisconsin Roettger entries are Roettger Excavating (Centuria, USDOT 1044056) and Roettgers Company Inc (Milwaukee, USDOT 881638), neither matching). Somerset WI public schools awarded their bus contract to Safe-Way Bus Co in 2006 (USDOT 3923185, MC-1451781, 38 power units, located at 270 LaGrandeur, Somerset, WI 54025) - strongly suggesting Roettger Bus Service was the predecessor school bus operator in Somerset before 2006 and is now likely inactive/superseded. Listed input address 592 232nd Ave, Somerset, WI 54025 is a residential-area location distinct from Safe-Way's terminal.
